visual_description: A high-angle, wide shot captures a dark, chaotic scene at night. In the distance, a large, illuminated structure, possibly a castle or fortress, sits atop a hill, casting a warm glow. The foreground is almost entirely black, filled with the silhouettes of a massive, thrashing crowd. The audio is filled with a cacophony of loud, chaotic sounds. A deep, guttural, and monstrous roar echoes powerfully, suggesting the presence of a large, aggressive creature. This is immediately met with a high-pitched, piercing shriek, creating a tense and frightening atmosphere. The sounds blend into a tumultuous and overwhelming roar, as if a large group of powerful beings are moving and shouting in unison, evoking a sense of immense, chaotic energy and danger. The camera pans and tilts, following the movement of the indistinct figures as they surge and tumble across the dark landscape. The only light source comes from the distant, glowing structure, highlighting the chaos and the scale of the movement. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera continues to move erratically, weaving through the dark silhouettes, creating a sense of disorientation and urgency. The scene
